firmware.title: OnePlus Nord N100 OxygenOS 11.0.3.BE81AA
firmware.description:
OnePlus Nord N100 OxygenOS 11.0.3.BE81AA

A new software update is available for your Android Smartphone.

This release includes the following:

System

• Improved system stability and general bug fixes

• Updated Android Security Patch to 2021.10

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1

firmware.title: OnePlus Nord N100 OxygenOS 10.5.20.BE81AA
firmware.description:
OnePlus Nord N100 OxygenOS 10.5.20.BE81AA

Esta actualización mejora la seguridad del sistema.

【Sistema】

• Se ha integrado el parche de seguridad Android de marzo de 2023 para mejorar la seguridad del sistema.

firmware.title: OnePlus Nord N100 OxygenOS 11.0.15.BE81AA
firmware.description:
OnePlus Nord N100 OxygenOS 11.0.15.BE81AA

A new software update is available for your Android Smartphone.

This release includes the following:

System

• Integrates the October 2023 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
